problem_id: From Court Judgments to Verified Action Plans
team_name: Nishchay AI — Decision-Safe Judgment Intelligence System
summary: Build an AI system that can read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
optimization_claims: Reduces manual effort in reading judgments
Prevents missed deadlines and incorrect actions
constraints_addressed: Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
